texto: When God lays His finger on your heart it cannot help but be filled with love for others
autor: if that doesn't happen there is nothing wrong with God's finger there is something wrong with your heart
explicacao: Citação de if that doesn't happen there is nothing wrong with God's finger there is something wrong with your heart sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “When God lays His finger on your heart it cannot help but be filled with love for others” articula amor, rassool-jibraeel-snyman, reflexao em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
